title: YouTube Tool
html: Stub. A Rankett microservice for YouTube content (likely AI-visibility analysis on YT channels), hosted at youtube-tool-e513.onrender.com on Render. Claude Code auto-generated a handoff doc on 2026-02-04 covering Render service ID, app password, Supabase URLs, e2e smoke test, video-pipeline + auth architecture (2026 02 04 screenshot 2026 02 04 at 5 17 23 pm fddff4fb). Connects to the broader autonomous fulfillment engine (YouTube videos are listed under "manual" tasks in 2026 03 14 screenshot 2026 03 14 at 1 37 22 am bdcd4ee0).
